_meta.description: Print-on-demand research for 'What Is Love' book self-publishing
_meta.pricing_note: All prices in USD. Estimates based on 250-page, 6x9, B&W book. Many services use dynamic calculators - verify exact pricing before ordering.

recommendation_summary.best_for_drafts_reason: Cheapest paperback at $4.00/copy, no setup fees, easiest upload process. Must be publicly listed to order author copies.
recommendation_summary.best_for_final_hardcover_reason: Real cloth/leather hardcover options, fast 5-day turnaround, no public listing required, high quality. Good for 100-copy runs.
recommendation_summary.best_for_distribution_reason: 40,000+ retailer network including bookstores and libraries. Professional-grade quality. Best if you want the book in Catholic bookstores.
recommendation_summary.best_overall_for_ease_reason: Very easy upload, good quality, direct sales via your own website (Lulu Direct), no public listing required for personal copies.
recommendation_summary.recommended_strategy: Use Amazon KDP for cheap draft paperbacks ($4/copy). Use 48 Hour Books or Lulu for final hardcover copies. Consider IngramSpark if you want bookstore/library distribution later.

amazon_kdp.name: Amazon KDP (Kindle Direct Publishing)
amazon_kdp.ease_of_upload: Excellent - upload PDF interior + PDF cover, preview digitally, publish
amazon_kdp.upload_format: PDF (interior) + PDF (cover). Also accepts .docx for interior.

hardcover.type: Case laminate only (printed image on hard cover)
hardcover.note: NO dust jacket, NO cloth cover option. Limited compared to IngramSpark.

amazon_kdp.bulk_discounts: None. Same price per unit for 1 or 999 copies.

shipping.note: No fixed rates published. No Prime/free shipping for author copies.
shipping.warning: Shipping + tax can roughly double the per-copy cost.

isbn.own_isbn_note: Can use your own from Bowker ($125/single, $295/10 pack)

amazon_kdp.turnaround: ~2-3 weeks total (manufacturing + standard shipping). Manufacturing cannot be expedited.
amazon_kdp.print_quality: Good for B&W text. 55lb white paper (thicker than IngramSpark). Occasional consistency issues reported.
amazon_kdp.must_be_publicly_listed_note: Book MUST be live on Amazon to order author copies. Proof copies (max 5) available before publishing but have 'Not for Resale' watermark.
amazon_kdp.distribution: Amazon only (unless you also use IngramSpark)

lulu.name: Lulu
lulu.ease_of_upload: Very easy - step-by-step wizard, upload PDF, built-in cover creator
lulu.upload_format: PDF or DOCX for interior, PDF for cover (or use built-in cover creator)

paperback.pricing_formula: Dynamic - based on page count, paper type, binding, trim size

bulk_discounts.note: Volume discounts stack with promo codes.

shipping.note: Varies by destination and speed. Calculated at checkout.

lulu.turnaround: Print-on-demand, ships when ordered. ~1-2 weeks typical.
lulu.print_quality: Good. Well-regarded for paperbacks. Founded 2002 with long track record.
lulu.must_be_publicly_listed_note: Can order personal copies without listing for sale. Three goals: Lulu Bookstore, Global Distribution, or Lulu Direct (sell on your own site).
lulu.distribution: Lulu Bookstore, Amazon, 40,000+ retailers via global distribution, or sell on your own website via Lulu Direct
pros: No public listing required for personal copies
Direct sales via your own website (Lulu Direct)
Free to use, no setup fees
cons: Distribution royalties are low (retailers take 40-55%, Lulu takes 20% of remainder)

ingramspark.name: IngramSpark
ingramspark.ease_of_upload: Moderate - requires print-ready PDF files, stricter requirements. File review takes 3-5 business days. Must approve eProof before printing.
ingramspark.upload_format: Print-ready PDF only. Interior and cover as separate files. Strict specs (300dpi, CMYK, embedded fonts).
ingramspark.setup_fees: Free for new titles. $25 revision fee after 60 days.

paperback.pricing_note: Dynamic calculator. Prices as of Feb 2026 price sheet.

hardcover.type: Case laminate, dust jacket, or cloth options available
hardcover.cost_per_unit_200pg_reference: $7.95 (5.5x8.5, 200pg, B&W, creme - from bulk discount page)
hardcover.note: Best hardcover options of any POD service. Dust jackets available.

shipping.print_and_ship_time: 2-3 business days to print, then shipping
shipping.note: Shipping calculator available. Rates quoted at time of order.

isbn.free_isbn_imprint: You can use your own imprint name (unlike KDP free ISBN)

ingramspark.turnaround: 3-5 business days for file review, 2-3 days to print, then shipping. Total ~2-3 weeks.
ingramspark.print_quality: Professional grade. Slight edge over KDP, especially for hardcovers. 50lb paper standard.
ingramspark.must_be_publicly_listed_note: Can order author copies without distribution. Can also list for global distribution.

distribution.network: 40,000+ retailers including Barnes & Noble, Amazon, Baker & Taylor, independent bookstores, libraries, schools, universities
distribution.global: 200+ countries via Ingram International and Global Connect (local printing partners)
distribution.note: THE standard for getting books into physical bookstores and libraries. Catholic bookstores would likely order through Ingram.

pros: Free ISBN with your own imprint name
cons: Steeper learning curve - strict file requirements

barnes_noble_press.name: Barnes & Noble Press
barnes_noble_press.ease_of_upload: Easy - similar to KDP. Upload PDF files, approval within 24 hours typically.

hardcover.type: Case laminate or dust jacket available

barnes_noble_press.bulk_discounts: None currently. B&N says they hope to offer them in the future.

shipping.note: US only. No free shipping for author copies. Costs calculated at checkout.
shipping.estimated_delivery: Within 1 week for personal use copies

barnes_noble_press.turnaround: Printing + shipping typically within 1 week. Approval within 24 hours.
barnes_noble_press.print_quality: Good paperback quality. Some hardcover errors reported (wrong covers on wrong books).
barnes_noble_press.must_be_publicly_listed_note: Can order 'Print for Personal Use' copies without listing for sale. No ISBN required for personal copies.
barnes_noble_press.royalty_rate: 55% of retail price minus printing cost
barnes_noble_press.distribution: Barnes & Noble stores and BN.com only. Very limited compared to IngramSpark.
pros: No public listing required - can print for personal use
cons: US shipping only - cannot ship internationally
Books are 'nonreturnable' in B&N system (problematic for in-store orders)
Limited customer support (email only, AI-like responses reported)
Some hardcover quality control issues reported

48_hour_books.name: 48 Hour Books
48_hour_books.ease_of_upload: Good - upload print-ready PDF after placing order. Pre-press review included. PDF proof within 1-2 business days.
48_hour_books.upload_format: Print-ready PDF for interior and cover
48_hour_books.setup_fees: $100 deposit required to start (applied toward balance)
48_hour_books.revision_fees: $50 new file fee if you send revised files after proofing

paperback.pricing_note: Uses online calculator. Prices vary by exact specs and quantity.

hardcover.type: Case bound - cloth, leather, leatherette, or printed laminate covers available
hardcover.conversion_cost: $210 to convert 25 books to hardcover (when ordering 35+ paperbacks)
options: Cloth covers (foil stamped, with optional dust jacket)
Leather covers (foil stamped, with optional dust jacket)
hardcover.note: BEST hardcover options of any service researched. Real cloth and leather available.

shipping.domestic: US and Canada only (international via customer-arranged carrier)
shipping.note: Shipping costs calculated by zip code in their price calculator.

turnaround.note: Production time only - add shipping time. Reformatting adds 5-10 days.

48_hour_books.print_quality: Highly rated. HP Indigo and Xeikon presses. PUR adhesive for hardcovers. 5/5 on eKomi from 69 reviews.
48_hour_books.must_be_publicly_listed_note: This is a printer, not a marketplace. You order books and they ship to you. No public listing involved.
48_hour_books.distribution: None - this is a printer only. You handle your own distribution/sales.
pros: Fastest turnaround (48 hours for paperback production)
cons: No distribution services - you sell/distribute yourself
Pricing not transparent without using calculator
Reformatting service ($250 for 201-399 pages) adds time

bookbaby.name: BookBaby
bookbaby.ease_of_upload: Good - upload PDF after configuring quote. Templates provided. Press proof available ($99).
bookbaby.upload_format: PDF for interior and cover. Templates available for Word, InDesign, Google Docs, Apple Pages.
bookbaby.setup_fees: None for printing only. Distribution packages: $199 (BookBaby Bookshop) or $399 (Global Distribution)

paperback.pricing_note: Uses online quoter. Prices include no distribution.

hardcover.type: Adhesive case wrap, or case wrap with dust jacket

bookbaby.bulk_discounts: Prices decrease with quantity. Use online quoter for exact pricing.

shipping.turnaround: 3-5 days printing, 5 days typical to receive books

isbn.note: BookBaby listed as publisher of record if they provide ISBN

bookbaby.turnaround: 3-5 days printing. 4-8 weeks for full process with design services. Rush service available.
bookbaby.print_quality: High quality - HP Indigo and Xeikon presses (in-house printing).
bookbaby.distribution: Optional: BookBaby Bookshop ($199) or Global Distribution ($399) covering Amazon, B&N, Walmart, 50+ retailers
cons: EXPENSIVE - much higher per-unit cost than KDP or IngramSpark
Distribution packages are $199-$399 on top of printing
$399 distribution fee is on top of print costs
Total for 100 copies can exceed $1,300 including distribution

blurb.name: Blurb
blurb.ease_of_upload: Good - uses BookWright (free desktop software) or upload PDF. Also supports Adobe InDesign plugin.
blurb.upload_format: PDF, or create in BookWright (free) or InDesign

trade_book_paperback.pricing_note: Trade books are Blurb's text-focused format in 6x9
trade_book_paperback.note: Originally a photo book company. Trade books are their text-book format.

hardcover.note: No cloth or leather options. ImageWrap only.

bulk_discounts.10_plus: 10% off trade books (20% off photo books)
bulk_discounts.100_plus: Contact Large Order Services for custom quote

shipping.production_time: ~5 business days to print and bind

isbn.free_isbn_note: All trade books get an ISBN automatically (required for trade format)

blurb.turnaround: 5 business days print + 1-5 business days shipping = 6-10 business days total
blurb.print_quality: Good for photo books. Trade books are adequate but not Blurb's primary focus.
blurb.distribution: Blurb Bookstore, Amazon and Ingram network (via Blurb's distribution)
pros: Free BookWright software is easy to use
Free ISBN included on trade books
cons: Originally a photo book company - not optimized for text-only books
Higher prices than KDP/IngramSpark for text books

gorham_printing.name: Gorham Printing
gorham_printing.ease_of_upload: Good - upload print-ready PDF, automated prepress review, online proof of cover and interior
gorham_printing.note: Traditional short-run printer. Good for medium runs (100-500+).

hardcover.note: Significantly more expensive than POD services for hardcover.

pricing_comparison_250pg_6x9_bw.description: Quick comparison table - estimated per-unit cost for 250pg 6x9 B&W book

amazon_kdp.note: Exact. Case laminate only, no cloth.

barnes_noble_press.note: Estimate. Case laminate or dust jacket.

ingramspark.note: Case laminate. Dust jacket also available.

lulu.note: Casewrap. Linen wrap with dust jacket also available.

bookbaby.note: Case wrap or with dust jacket.

gorham_printing.note: Traditional printing. Expensive for small runs.
